description: At the Lighthouse, Benson, Elena, and Mack experience the full horror of the parasite as Keller, now consumed by the alien being, becomes dangerously unstable. They race to get him into containment, aware that if Keller goes critical it could destroy the facility. The drama is tense and tragic as the situation spirals toward disaster.

transcript.line: The anesthesia's not working. You're gonna have to hold him still.
Okay. I'm right here. Just stay with me.
He burned me. Oh, his temperature's through the roof. He should be coding.
We're gonna have to get him into isolation now. If his body's flooding with that accelerant, a-and he reaches a certain temperature...
I-I don't know. W-We're underground. H-He could take this whole place out.
There's a containment unit on the north end of the hallway.
Clear the floor! Get out of the way! Keller, hold on. Hold on.
Get away, as far as you can. Run!
